title: Israeli Soldiers Fatally Shoot 2 People in Southern Lebanon, Health Officials Say
summary_full: The shooting came a day after Israeli troops began operating under new orders intended to reduce the risk of flare-ups in its conflict with Iran-backed Hezbollah militants.
summary_public: The shooting came a day after Israeli troops began operating under new orders intended to reduce the risk of flare-ups in its conflict with Iran-backed Hezbollah militants.
